raw_input: McKinsey has raised their EP requirement from EP4 to EP5 for the 2027 intake.

intent_cards.summary: Update McKinsey EP requirement from EP3 to EP5 for 2027 intake

diff.ep_requirement: EP5 required for 2027 intake (raised from EP3). McKinsey has historically been more flexible on EP tier than banks, prioritising academic and problem-solving credentials.

intent_cards.raw_input_ref: McKinsey has raised their EP requirement from EP4 to EP5 for the 2027 intake.
